rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: Zaninelli, F, 2023., Some Remarks on Wilhelm BOde and the Art Market in Italy, 1880-1909: The Cases of Pietro Foresti (1854-1926) and A. Chiesa., In Smalcerz,, pp. 151-205.
rdf:Description.dcterms:title: Some Remarks on Wilhelm BOde and the Art Market in Italy, 1880-1909: The Cases of Pietro Foresti (1854-1926) and A. Chiesa.
